hero.headline: AI transformation for finance teams.
hero.headlineAccent: By experts who know the processes from the inside.
hero.subheadline: We help CFOs and finance leaders implement AI that actually works – not just pay for licenses.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: From AI strategy to hands-on implementation in your finance team

items.title: AI Readiness for Finance
items.description: We assess where your team is ready and where the biggest opportunities for improvement lie.
items.detail: We conduct a comprehensive assessment of your finance department – from processes and tools to people readiness. The result is a clear opportunity map with concrete recommendations for where AI will bring the most value.

items.title: AI Use Case Identification
items.description: Concrete use cases for accounting, tax, controlling and reporting.
items.detail: We don't work with abstract AI possibilities – we find concrete use cases for your actual processes. The result is a prioritized list with ROI estimates and implementation complexity for each case.

items.title: AI Strategy Design
items.description: A structured AI implementation plan tailored to your finance department's processes.
items.detail: We create an AI transformation roadmap tailored to your finance department – with a clear sequence of steps, KPIs, milestones and a way to measure success.

items.title: AI Adoption & Change Management
items.description: We guide your team through the change – from skeptics to active AI users.
items.detail: The biggest barrier to AI isn't tools, it's people. We help with change management, team education and building a culture where AI is a helper, not a threat.

items.title: Tool Selection & Implementation
items.description: We select and deploy the right AI tools for your specific context and needs.
items.detail: We navigate the crowded AI tools market. We help you choose what truly fits – and we don't stop at selection, but guide you through implementation and onboarding too.
